_readme: Draft mapping of CBETA canon codes (and, for the Taisho canon, volume ranges that correspond to the traditional bu/部 catalog divisions) to the 8 lineage layers from the diagram. This is a STARTING POINT for human review, not a finished classification -- confidence flags where a canon spans multiple layers or where coverage is partial/non-authoritative. Texts with confidence 'low' or layer null should be reviewed manually before publishing.

layers.1: 巴利经律、阿含 (Early Texts: Pali Vinaya/Nikaya, Agama)
layers.3: 部派阿毘达磨 (Sectarian Abhidharma, the seven books)
layers.4: 部派体系论 (Systematic sectarian treatises: Vibhasa, Kosa, Visuddhimagga...)
layers.5: 大乘经典及基础体系论 (Mahayana sutras + foundational treatises: Madhyamaka, Yogacarabhumi)
layers.6: 成熟体系论 (Mature systematic treatises: Samuccaya, Mahayanasamgraha, Vijnaptimatrata, Bodhicaryavatara)
layers.7: 哲学体系与宗派体系 (Madhyamaka/Yogacara as philosophy; Tiantai/Huayan/Chan/Tibetan lamrim schools)
layers.8: 现代法师 (Modern teachers' collected works)

_text_overrides_readme: Per-document corrections, keyed by CBETA id (the xml filename without extension, e.g. 'T30n1564'). Checked BEFORE any canon/volume rule, so this is the mechanism for fixing one specific text without touching the broader canon/volume rule that everything else in that range still relies on. Use this for texts the canon/volume rules get wrong, or for texts from an otherwise-unmapped canon (A/C/K/L/P/S/U/GA/GB/D/ZS/...) that are worth surfacing individually rather than leaving null.

A091n1057.note: 新譯大方廣佛華嚴經音義 - a Huayan glossary/phonetic commentary; canon A (趙城金藏) is otherwise left unmapped as a historical variant edition, but this specific text is worth surfacing under 宗派体系 rather than dropping entirely.

volume_ranges.note: 南传律藏、长部、中部、相应部、增支部、小部及义释类，归第1层巴利经律/阿含。
南传阿毗达磨七论：法集、分别、界、人施設、双、发趣、论事。
弥兰王问经，非七论，作为早期/部派体系论参考归第4层。
岛王统史、大王统史、小王统史，史传资料，列参考文献。
清净道论，归第4层部派体系论。
N70 混合附录卷，逐篇以 text_overrides 处理。

LC.note: 吕澄著作集，学术性质与现代法师不完全相同，可考虑双标签归7与8

ZW.note: 藏外佛教文献为混合文献合集；当前语料已逐篇复核，新增文本仍需按内容归层。

X.note: 新纂卍续藏，以宗派注疏、禅宗语录为主，部分属经疏部应复核是否近于第5/6层

J.note: 嘉兴藏以明清禅宗语录、宗派文献为主；当前语料已逐篇复核，默认归第7层。

B.note: 大藏经补编已按当前语料逐篇复核；新增文本仍需按题名与内容归层。

GA.note: 佛寺志汇刊，属史地理类文献，不属于8层中任一层，建议单列“参考文献”栏目

ZS.note: 正史佛教类编，史料汇编，同上

D.note: 国图善本佛典，版本学性质，需按内容重新划入对应层级，不单独成层

T._note: 大正藏按卷次区间映射到传统「部」划分，再映射到层级。边界以 CBETA 目录为准，个别经可能跨部，需人工复核。
